# backend/marketing_campaigns/router.py
# auto-generated explainer · 2026-06-11T10:01:42Z

## Purpose
/api/v1/marketing-campaigns/* — multi-channel marketing campaigns.

Reuses voice_ai_customers + voice_ai_products tables.

### Functions
- `_correlation_id(request)`: (no docstring)

- `dlp_status()`: T6.10 · Presidio Stage-1 adapter status.
- `dlp_test(text)`: T6.10 · operator-facing DLP scan (use this to test what entities
- `channels()`: Per-channel config docs for the operator UI.
- `list_campaigns(request, channel)`: (no docstring)
- `create_campaign(body, request)`: (no docstring)
- `autonomous_run(body, request)`: Run the autonomous decision loop · returns full audit trail.
- `autonomous_runs(request, limit)`: List recent agent runs · for the decision-loop dashboard.
- `autonomous_run_one(run_ref, request)`: Single agent run · full decisions trail.

- ─── Autonomous AI agent endpoints (declared BEFORE /{campaign_id} so they
- don't get shadowed by FastAPI route-precedence)

- These are reachable by the END CUSTOMER from the survey_url / form_url
